name: muscle
description: MUSCLE plugin bundle for Codex with shared commands, skills, lifecycle hooks, local evidence surfaces, and project-local review state.

interface.shortDescription: Project-local review memory, evidence, and diagnostics
interface.longDescription: MUSCLE adds project-local review memory, doctor diagnostics, lifecycle hooks, command evidence, savings reports, discovery reports, and generated active-review snapshots while keeping project memory authoritative.
defaultPrompt: Use MUSCLE when you need a project-local review baseline, lifecycle diagnostics, evidence-backed savings/discovery reports, or a generated active-review snapshot.
